name: alkanes-asm-common
description: Common AssemblyScript library for Alkanes tx-scripts

scripts.test:debug: npm run build:test && NODE_ENV=debug mocha --reporter spec --require ts-node/register 'test/**/*.spec.ts'
scripts.build:test: asc test/fixtures/test-context.ts --target release --exportRuntime --bindings esm --outFile test/fixtures/test-context.wasm && asc test/fixtures/test-staticcall.ts --target release --exportRuntime --bindings esm --outFile test/fixtures/test-staticcall.wasm && asc test/fixtures/test-execution-context.ts --target release --exportRuntime --bindings esm --outFile test/fixtures/test-execution-context.wasm
